## What mcp-toolsmith does

`mcp-toolsmith` converts OpenAPI 3.x specifications into production-ready TypeScript MCP server templates, including typed tool modules, configuration scaffolding, and local integration snippets.

## Install

```bash
pip install mcp-toolsmith
```

## Quickstart

See the quickstart workflow in the project README:
https://github.com/leonarduk/mcp-toolsmith#documentation

## Known limitations

- OpenAPI 3.x only
- Linux/macOS focused generation workflow
- Generated server template targets TypeScript ESM only

## Architecture rationale

Architecture decision records live under:
https://github.com/leonarduk/mcp-toolsmith/tree/main/docs/adr
